induction_input: the book the student read disappeared.
the report the manager submitted failed.
the cake the chef baked vanished.
the plan the team developed collapsed.
the letter the secretary typed arrived.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences using a center-embedded relative clause (no relative pronoun) where a noun modified by "[noun] [past verb]" serves as the subject of a simple past verb.
induced_prompt: Write sentences using a center-embedded relative clause (no relative pronoun) where a noun modified by "[noun] [past verb]" serves as the subject of a simple past verb.
l2_sentences: The cake the chef baked disappeared within minutes.
The letter the professor wrote confused all of his students.
The dog the neighbors adopted escaped through the fence yesterday.
The report the manager submitted caused a serious scandal.
The car the mechanic fixed broke down again on the highway.
l1_sentences: the book the student read disappeared.
the report the manager submitted failed.
the cake the chef baked vanished.
the plan the team developed collapsed.
the letter the secretary typed arrived.
